_description: Affiliate site project manifest — defines site config, page inventory, and prompt strategy for rapid buildout

site.name: The Apiary Guide
site.tagline: Everything You Need to Start and Grow Your Hive

promptStrategy.pass1Role: architect — generates structured outline: sections, subheadings, angles, affiliate placement
promptStrategy.pass2Role: builder — implements the outline into full HTML following the shared template

roundup.description: Best-of affiliate list — 5-10 products with pros/cons and buy links

comparison.description: X vs Y — direct comparison of two products or approaches

guide.description: How-to or beginner guide — educational with soft affiliate placement

editorial.description: History, science, cultural — authority content, minimal affiliate

directory.description: Clubs, associations, resources — link bait, community building

spotlight.description: Beekeeper profile — community outreach, interview format

pages.title: Best Beginner Beekeeping Starter Kit
pages.notes: Highest buyer intent page on the site. Cover complete kits vs build-your-own. Include hive, suit, smoker, tools, feeder.

pages.title: Best Beekeeping Suits and Protective Gear
pages.notes: Full suits vs jackets vs veils. Budget picks vs premium. Size and fit guidance.

pages.title: Best Beekeeping Smokers
pages.notes: Size, fuel type, ease of use. Must-have for every beekeeper.

pages.title: Best Hive Tools for Beekeepers
pages.notes: J-hook vs standard vs frame grip. Budget picks. Bundle suggestions.

pages.title: Best Honey Extractors
pages.notes: Manual vs electric. 2-frame vs 4-frame vs radial. First extractor vs upgrade.

pages.title: Langstroth vs Top Bar vs Warre Hive — Which Should You Choose?
pages.notes: Most-searched beekeeping comparison. Clear verdict for beginners. Link to all three hive types on Amazon.

pages.title: Best Books About Beekeeping
pages.notes: Beginner books vs advanced. Field guides vs narrative. All Amazon affiliate links.

pages.title: Best Documentaries and Movies About Bees
pages.notes: Queen of the Sun, More Than Honey, etc. Amazon Prime links where available.

pages.title: The Complete Beginner's Guide to Beekeeping
pages.notes: Highest-volume informational query. Comprehensive. Links to product pages throughout. Hub for the Learn pillar.

pages.title: How to Inspect a Beehive (Step by Step)
pages.notes: Practical how-to. Links to hive tools, smokers, suits. Seasonal timing guidance.

pages.title: How to Harvest Honey from Your Hive
pages.notes: Step by step. Links to extractors, uncapping tools, storage jars. When and how often.

pages.title: Common Beekeeping Problems and How to Fix Them
pages.notes: Varroa mites, hive beetles, swarming, queenlessness. Links to treatments and tools.

pages.title: The History of Beekeeping — From Ancient Egypt to Modern Hives
pages.notes: Long-form evergreen. Ancient Egypt, Greece, Rome, Langstroth's invention of the modern hive. Highly shareable. Link bait.

pages.title: The Science of Honey — How Bees Make It
pages.notes: Biology, chemistry, antimicrobial properties. Shareable. Links to honey storage, testing equipment.

pages.title: Famous Beekeepers Throughout History
pages.notes: Langstroth, Huber, Dzierzon, Leo Tolstoy, Leo Tolstoy, Sherlock Holmes (fictional). Fun, shareable.

pages.title: Types of Bees — A Guide to Bee Species
pages.notes: Honeybees vs bumblebees vs mason bees vs carpenter bees. Which to keep, which to encourage.

pages.title: Beekeeping Clubs and Associations Directory
pages.notes: By state. National orgs. Submit your club form. Massive link bait — clubs link back when listed. Most important community page.

pages.title: Beekeeper Spotlight — Meet the Community
pages.notes: Hub page linking to individual beekeeper profiles. Outreach-driven. Builds relationships and backlinks.

pages.title: National Beekeeping Associations and Organizations
pages.notes: ABF, AHPA, state extensions. Links to membership, resources, events.

pages.title: Beekeeping for Beginners — Everything You Need to Know Before You Start
pages.notes: Slightly different angle from the complete guide — focused on pre-start decisions. Zoning, cost, time commitment, neighbors.

pages.title: How Much Does Beekeeping Cost? A Complete Budget Breakdown
pages.notes: Startup costs vs ongoing. Links to all the products naturally. High buyer intent disguised as informational.

pages.title: Beekeeping Laws and Regulations by State
pages.notes: Can I keep bees in my backyard? Zoning, HOA, registration. High search volume for urban beekeepers.

pages.title: Urban Beekeeping — A Guide to Keeping Bees in the City
pages.notes: Growing trend. Rooftop hives, small spaces, neighbor relations, city regulations. Links to compact equipment.

pages.title: The Beekeeping Year — A Seasonal Calendar and Checklist
pages.notes: What to do each month. Spring buildup, summer honey, fall prep, winter survival. Links to seasonal products.

pages.title: Varroa Mite Treatment — Best Options and How to Use Them
pages.notes: Biggest pest problem in modern beekeeping. Oxalic acid, formic acid, Apivar. All available on Amazon.

pages.title: Honey Bee Biology — Understanding Your Colony
pages.notes: Queen, workers, drones. Life cycle, communication, waggle dance. Builds authority. Links to educational books.

pages.title: Best Beekeeping Courses and Classes Online
pages.notes: Online courses, local extensions, YouTube channels. Links to books and courses on Amazon.

pages.title: A Guide to Honey Varieties — Flavors, Origins, and Uses
pages.notes: Manuka, buckwheat, clover, raw vs processed. Links to specialty honeys and tasting sets on Amazon.

pages.title: Best Gifts for Beekeepers
pages.notes: Seasonal traffic spike around holidays. Easy affiliate page. Covers all price ranges.

pages.title: About The Apiary Guide
pages.notes: Mission, who we are, affiliate disclosure. Trust signal. Keep it genuine.
